title: fix models
body: model 명령을 models 로 rename — 슬래시 /model 이 Claude Code 기본 /model 과 충돌해 picker 에서 가려지던 문제 해소. CLI subcommand·slash·모듈(runModels)·commands/models.md·dataset 상호참조·ARCHITECTURE 노드·TOOLKIT 카탈로그 일괄 갱신. 데이터 키 .models[] 는 불변(네임스페이스 분리).

title: feat(architecture): add untested ⚪ pre-state to result store (registered-but-not-run · 3 directions unchanged)
body: 결과 스토어에 선행상태 untested⚪(등록됐으나 아직 안 잼) 1개 추가 — 방향 3단계(pos/in-prog/neg)는 신호등 그대로 두고, '데이터 없음'을 표현 못하던 공백만 메움. RESULT_STATES=CONV_STATES+untested (convergence 는 strict trio 유지). 세부 '왜'(막힘·불확정·무효)는 metric 자유서술. anima G0~G6 처럼 미측정 게이트를 정직하게 구분 가능.

title: refactor(architecture): unify neg-conv icon 🧱→🔴 (reserve 🧱 for break-walls terminal verdict)
body: convergence-state 의 neg-conv 아이콘을 🧱→🔴 로 통일 — 수렴상태 네거티브는 🔴(음성 결과), 🧱은 break-walls 종결벽(다중렌즈 소진 후) 전용으로 분리. convStateLabel 한 곳만 변경(results 와 공유) · 중복 resultStateLabel 제거 · ARCHITECTURE.json convergence/results note+node · 코드주석

title: feat(architecture): bench/experiment result accumulation store (result subcommand · 3-stage convergence-state)
body: architecture 에 벤치·실험 결과 누적 스토어 추가 — 3단계 수렴상태(pos-conv/in-prog/neg-conv) 공유. convergence 재발학습 store 의 누적 형제: sidecar architecture result {list [--kind bench|experiment]|for <subject>|add --kind <k> --subject <s> --value <v> [--state|--metric|--new|--id]|edit|rm}. 별도 top-level results.records[] 스토어(id·kind·state·value·metric·subject) · convergence 와 달리 file-touch 표면화·Stop게이트 없음(순수 누적 · falsified/음성 결과 보존 · honesty·preserve-state) · lint RESULT-MALFORMED 게이트(id+valid kind+valid state) · 트리 hygiene skip · CC/Pi 무관(엔진 CLI 공유, hook 미배선)

title: feat prefs
body: add prefs stop-check — a turn-close WARN Stop gate (never blocks) enforcing the prefs language axes the per-edit guards can't cover: DOCS axis (working-tree diff of doc files .md/README/CHANGELOG authored this turn with Korean prose, backtick code-spans exempt) and RESPONSE axis (heuristic: reply prose almost entirely non-Hangul while prefs.response=korean). CODE axis stays covered per-edit by codeLangViolation (post.ts) so it is NOT re-checked here (avoids double-nag + Korean-string-literal false positives). Wired on Stop in both hooks/hooks.json and setup.ts (global settings); CC-only like other Stop gates. Inline last-assistant reader avoids a circular import with recommend.ts. Escalates prefs from advisory-inject-only to enforced-warn; hard block stays only on re-injected governance docs.

title: feat recommend
body: recommend.md is now a language-variant inject like easy: config/recommend.md (English base) + config/recommend.ko.md (Korean, with the user-facing 4-axis box labels ①완성도…), picked by prefs response language (recLangCode → recommendFile in recommend.ts, mirrors easy's styles/easy.<lang>.md). The English base stays lean; the Korean user sees a Korean box. injectCapViolations + the injects report now group language-variant file sets (foo.md + foo.<lang>.md) by base name and count only the MAX once toward injectBudgetBytes (a variant set ships ONE per turn), so adding recommend.ko.md does not double-count the budget. Both variants capped 6500.

title: feat architecture
body: convergence.records[].state is now the 3-stage CONVERGENCE classification: pos-conv (🟢 포지티브 수렴 · fix/lesson converged positive, recurrence held) / in-prog (🔄 진행·검토 · still converging) / neg-conv (🧱 네거티브 수렴 · converged negative, prevention hit a wall). Replaces the ad-hoc lifecycle enum (ossified/stable/in_flight/pending/completed/completed_gap/failed/blocked); those legacy values are still ACCEPTED and normalized on read+display (normalizeConvState) so pre-migration records never hard-fail, and add/edit store the canonical form. Display renders an icon label (convStateLabel). Migrated all existing records (ossified->pos-conv, in_flight->in-prog, failed->neg-conv). add default state pos-conv.

title: fix pre
body: preWrite/parseToolInput now gather edits[].new_string so the MultiEdit tool shape ({file_path,edits:[…]}) is scanned like Write/Edit — closes the CLAUDE.md/commons.md Korean-prose bypass (INJECT-NON-ENGLISH silently passed MultiEdit because parseToolInput yielded empty content). Fragment-safe: MultiEdit counts as isEditFragment so section-aware + byte-cap guards still skip it; covers both CC and Pi surfaces (shared CLI). Smoke: state/pre-korean-multiedit-smoke/run.sh.

title: fix architecture
body: fix ARCH-ID enforcement dodge: id gate keyed on the presence of a name key, so a rendered tree node carrying role/detail (or legacy 역할/상세) but NO name escaped ARCH-ID-MISSING entirely. Broadened the rendered-node predicate to name|role|detail (+legacy 이름/역할/상세) so every drawn node requires a stable id; structural wrappers (children-only), columns (key/label), and the convergence store stay exempt. Verified: a name-less role/detail node now blocks; sidecar's own tree has no false positives.

title: feat lint
body: commons.md held to the SAME lean byte cap as CLAUDE.md (COMMONS-OVERSIZED · lint.commonsCap default 8000). commons.md is the governance SSOT re-injected every turn (commons inject), same context-rot risk as CLAUDE.md, so it gets an always-on per-source byte cap (all repos, no config; diff-aware; commit-time + save-time via governanceDocWriteViolation). Trimmed sidecar's own config/commons.md 12990B -> 7968B (all 29 rule slugs + do/dont directives preserved; only mechanism/example prose cut, which lives in code+CHANGELOG+git). Moved config/commons.md from injectCaps to injectBudgetExtra (commonsCap now owns its per-source cap; still counted in the aggregate injectBudgetBytes).

title: feat lint
body: ban history/changelog content in CLAUDE.md (CLAUDE-MD-HISTORY · block). CLAUDE.md is current-state governance re-injected every turn, not a log — dates (ISO YYYY-MM-DD), changelog/history/version-history section headings, and change-narration (previously/formerly/renamed from/used to be · 이전엔/예전엔/구버전) accrete staleness+context-rot; history belongs in CHANGELOG + git (mirrors ARCH-HISTORY for the design tree). Backtick code-spans exempt. Fires at BOTH commit-time (staged CLAUDE.md · diff-aware) and SAVE-time (Write+Edit via governanceDocWriteViolation). All repos, no config.

title: feat(guard): portable-path-guard 포팅 — SHIPPED 스크립트 하드코딩 홈경로 warn (archive parity gap #1)
body: 감사에서 드러난 archive 대비 강제 갭 #1 포팅. archive 의 portable-path-guard 가 있던 자리에 현재 사이드카는 아무 강제가 없었다(0매치) — SHIPPED 런타임 스크립트가 절대 홈경로(/Users/<you>/…, /home/<you>/…)를 하드코딩하면 다른 host/user 에서 즉시 깨지는데(사이드카는 ~/.sidecar/cli 로 글로벌 배포 + pool 호스트 실행) 넛지가 없었음. modules/portable-path-guard.ts 신설 — preWrite advisory(PORTABLE-PATH): 대상이 (1) SHIPPED 디렉토리(hooks/·commands/·skills/·bin/·pi/) 의 (2) 스크립트(.sh/.py/.hexa/.ts/.js/.rb/.pl) 이고 (3) 내용에 /Users/ 또는 /home/ 리터럴이 있으면 warn 하며 런타임 해석 형태(/Users/mini·CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT·PATH·config)를 권고. block 아닌 advisory(홈경로 리터럴은 doc 예시로도 등장 가능 → 오탐 비용=경고 한 줄, 하드블록은 false-positive factory). Write·Edit 양쪽 발화(fragment 가 리터럴을 추가해도 잡음 · isEditFragment 비게이트). config portablePathGuard 기본 ON(config-ts-1: 마커 키잉 없이 전 repo 발화, harness.config.json 으로 완화). 양 surface 자동(공유 preWrite · CC hooks Write|Edit + Pi tool_call). 스모크 5/5: 스크립트내 홈경로=warn · 클린=무음 · modules밖스코프=무음 · 비스크립트ext=무음 · Edit fragment=warn. tsc green, ARCH-BIG-CELL clean.

title: feat(git-guard): main 고정 — GIT-EDIT-OFF-MAIN (non-default 브랜치에서 Write/Edit 차단)
body: guardBranchSwitch 는 main 워크트리에서 '떠나기'(checkout/switch)만 막았고, 세션이 이미 non-default 브랜치에 주차된 채 시작하면 편집을 못 막았다 — git-context 는 warn-only 라 지난 anima 사고(stale feature 브랜치에서 옛 코드 편집, #3736)를 못 막음. 대칭 완성으로 preWrite 에 GIT-EDIT-OFF-MAIN 코드가드 추가: main 워크트리가 non-default 브랜치(HEAD != origin/main|master)에 있으면 Write/Edit 을 차단(deny), git checkout <default> 복귀 또는 격리 워크트리(git worktree add -b) 유도. Write·Edit 양쪽 발화(브랜치 위치 검사라 content 무관·isEditFragment 비게이트). 핫패스 경량: isMainWorktree+symbolic-ref 로 main/master 면 즉시 통과, non-default HEAD 만 probeGitContext(cwd 파라미터화) 로 실 default-ref 확인. 격리 워크트리 면제(탈출구). config git.guardOffMainEdit 기본 ON, harness.config.json 으로 완화. probeGitContext 에 cwd 인자 추가(REPO_ROOT 기본, 가드는 편집 워크트리 gcwd 전달). 스모크 3/3: off-main=deny·on-main=allow·격리워크트리=면제. tsc green, ARCH-BIG-CELL clean.

title: feat pre
body: add SAVE-time (Write/Edit) teeth for governance-doc lints: block Korean prose in CLAUDE.md/commons.md (runs on Write AND Edit fragment) and an oversized CLAUDE.md (full Write) the MOMENT it is saved via the PreToolUse(Write) guard (governanceDocWriteViolation in pre.ts), instead of only at commit-time (which a user's own terminal commit never hits). Fragment-safe (english-only is not section-aware · pre-ts-1); byte cap skips Edit fragments (commit-time lint is the backstop). Applies on BOTH surfaces (CC pre write + Pi tool_call → pre write · shared CLI).

title: feat lint
body: add ALWAYS-ON CLAUDE.md byte cap (CLAUDE-MD-OVERSIZED · lint.claudeMdCap default 8000). CLAUDE.md is re-injected every turn (claudemd inject) in every repo, so an oversized one silently taxes all future turns (context-rot). Applies to every tracked CLAUDE.md (root + subfolder guides) in every repo with no config; diff-aware (only a STAGED CLAUDE.md over cap blocks, legacy bloated files grandfathered until touched). Severity block; 0 = explicit opt-out.

title: feat config+lint
body: governance now fires in EVERY git repo unconditionally — abolished the managed-project marker (isManaged/CLAUDE.md-keyed) in favor of a single honest git-repo floor (inGitRepo = .git at REPO_ROOT). ship/ing Stop-gates + commit lint no longer require CLAUDE.md or harness.config.json opt-in, so brand-new repos are governed with zero setup; non-git dirs stay quiet. Also made INJECT-NON-ENGLISH always-on: built-in baseline (CLAUDE.md · commons.md) UNION-ed with per-repo lint.injectEnglishOnly (additive-only, gate removed), so Korean prose in re-injected governance docs is blocked in every repo, no config. convergence config-ts-1 updated (marker-keying → git-repo floor).

title: docs(commons): fix-the-tool — canonical-repo-not-installed-copy discipline
body: commons fix-the-tool: encode canonical-repo-not-installed-copy discipline. do: land the fix in the tool's CANONICAL source repo (dev clone/upstream e.g. ~/dancinlab/hexa-lang) + merge via that repo's own pr-cycle/ship so it survives reinstall/self-update and reaches every consumer. dont: patching only the INSTALLED/vendored/cached copy (~/.hx/src·node_modules·site-packages·build cache) = per-machine bandaid a self-update/reinstall silently reverts — a live installed-copy edit to unblock NOW is temporary + STILL land upstream same cycle. Closes the recurring failure mode where a hexa-lang dep bug was fixed in ~/.hx/src (the vendored copy hexa runs from) instead of the canonical dev clone, so self-update reverted it.

title: feat(injects): context-rot 알람 — injects context-check Stop 훅(warn-only·절대 block 아님). 주입 footprint 는 잡았지만 긴 세션이 context 창을 채우면 attention 저하(context-rot·lost-in-middle, 연구 150-400K대)로 에이전트가 둔해지는 건 미조치였음. transcript 의 마지막 compact_boundary 이후 바이트로 현재 window 추정(≈bytes/4), WARN 200k/LOUD 350k 넘으면 /compact·새세션 권고. /compact 직후 오경보 방지(경계 이후만 카운트). 양 surface(setup.ts+hooks.json) 배선. 스모크 3/3(발동·stop_hook_active 무음·소형 무음). tsc green

fix(git-guard): scope main-ref-move arg scan to its statement — compound false-positive fix. #293 가드가 args 를 첫 branch 이후 커맨드 전체로 스캔해, 뒤 커맨드의 bare main(예: fetch origin main)을 feature 삭제 op 의 인자로 오인→feature 브랜치 삭제를 오차단. args 를 다음 git/셸연산자(|;&<>)에서 컷해 단일 문장으로 스코프. 스모크 8/8(오탐 4 ALLOW·진짜 hijack 3 BLOCK·main-before-branch 1). tsc green. 세션내 실측 재현·수정
feat(injects): sidecar injects — per-turn inject footprint 리포트(소스별 bytes/tok/cap + 집계 vs injectBudgetBytes) + /injects slash. context-rot 가시성
perf(recommend): recommend.md lean 5772→4681B(-18.9%·~273tok/턴) — rubric 산문 압축, r1-r4·box ASCII·모드명·conclusion-line 포맷 보존

feat(inject): SessionStart inject dedup — emitInject 세션키(CLAUDE_SESSION_ID) fallback + architecture·git-context 배선. 이중배선(settings+plugin) SessionStart·컴팩션후 2× 를 세션당 1회로. toolkit/companions 는 원래 stderr(CC 미주입)라 carrier 유지
fix(inject): per-turn inject 이중발화 dedup(emitInject) — context-rot 반감
body: AI 멍청 방지 최대 레버 — per-turn inject 이중발화 제거. 근본원인: 8개 UserPromptSubmit inject(commons·claudemd·recommend·prefs·easy·load·ing)가 settings.json(sidecar install) + plugin hooks.json(/plugin) 양쪽 배선 → 둘 다 활성 유저는 매턴 각 블록 2× 주입 = context-rot. lib/inject.ts emitInject: 프롬프트키 atomic-mkdir dedup(30s TTL·vanish 방지)로 매턴 1회만 emit. 7 inject 배선(raw stdout.write→emitInject). 스모크: commons 1회차 12845B→2회차 0B(dedup)→새프롬프트 재emit OK. tsc green. per-turn inject 반감.

title: chore(guard): state-guard 폐기 — scatter 디렉토리 차단 코드 가드 제거(거버넌스 preserve-state는 유지)
body:
- state-designation 코드 가드(modules/state-guard.ts) 폐기: `.verdicts`·`bench`·`experiments`·`scratch` 등 scatter 디렉토리 생성을 Write/Edit + Bash(mkdir/touch/cp/mv) 양쪽에서 BLOCK 하던 STATE-SCATTER-DIR 가드를 제거.
- 제거 범위: modules/state-guard.ts 삭제 · modules/pre.ts 에서 import + bash/write 두 가드 블록 제거 · lib/config.ts 에서 stateGuard 토글 필드+기본값 제거 · modules/CLAUDE.md 테이블 행 · README pre-bash 가드 목록 state{...} 세그먼트 · ARCHITECTURE.json state-guard 노드 + NO_SCATTER_STATE_DIR convergence 레코드.
- 유지: commons preserve-state 거버넌스 규칙(코드 이빨 없던 원래 상태로 복귀 = governance-only) · `state/` 디렉토리 자체(docs.scratchDir SSOT, 타 모듈 사용) · CLAUDE.md tree 의 state/ 라인.
- 양 표면 커버: 가드는 `sidecar pre` CLI 가 호출 → pre.ts 제거로 CC·Pi 모두 무발화. 검증: dev launcher 로 `mkdir bench` 스모크=무차단(이전 BLOCK→통과) · deno check pre.ts/config.ts clean · ARCHITECTURE.json valid JSON · 코드 orphan 참조 0.

title: feat(lint): inject docs 영어화(commons+CLAUDE.md) + INJECT-NON-ENGLISH 차단 lint
body: inject 거버넌스 docs 영어화 + 영어외(한글) 차단 lint. Workflow(6 agent 병렬)로 commons.md(14405→12620B·−12%)·CLAUDE.md(4770→3791B·−20%)·lib/modules/pi CLAUDE.md 전부 영어화(슬러그·@*-ok 마커·CLI·구조 보존 · 백틱 안 리터럴 해당없음/구현됨 면제 · do/dont ≤200자). 신규 lint INJECT-NON-ENGLISH(block): config.lint.injectEnglishOnly=[commons.md,CLAUDE.md(basename)] 의 재주입 docs 에 백틱 밖 한글 있으면 차단(staged diff-aware grandfather · git ls-files basename 매칭). 한글 3byte/char=영어 1byte → per-turn 총합 25241→22183B(≈5545tok·−12%). cap 고착 commons 13000·budget 22883. tsc·lint green · 한글삽입 차단 스모크 OK. (CLAUDE.md rate-limit agent 실패분은 직접 마무리)

title: chore(commons): 보수적 inject 트림(−225B) + cap 하향 고착 (A2)
body: A2 commons.md 보수적 트림 — 명백한 중복(이력표기 '구 @convergence 마커 폐기'·순수 재진술 'ARCHITECTURE SSOT 한곳으로'/'작업 끊김 방지'·헤더 메타·예시리스트 압축)만 안전 제거 14630→14405B(−225B). 정직: commons 는 대부분 load-bearing(괄호마다 마커·메커니즘·예외)이라 공격적 트림은 enforcement nuance 손실 → modest 에서 멈춤. 트림 고착: injectCaps.commons 15000→14600(여유195B)·injectBudgetBytes 26000→25500. 슬러그·do/dont·@*-ok 마커·CLI 전부 보존. lint ok.

title: fix(pr-cycle): worktree-merge 가토차 root-fix(pr-cycle-ts-1) + A3 injectBudgetExtra(CLAUDE.md 합산)
body: A1+A3. A1: worktree-ship 의 'merge failed' 가토차(pr-cycle-ts-1) root-fix — gh pr merge --delete-branch 가 머지후 로컬 git checkout base 를 linked worktree 에서 시도해 실패(GitHub 머지는 성공)하던 것을, merge loop 가 worktree 오류면 gh pr view state=MERGED verify 후 성공처리 + step4.5 가 base 가 타 worktree 점유면 git -C <mainWt> merge --ff-only 로 로컬 base ff (수동 마무리 불필요). A3: injectBudgetExtra 추가 — CLAUDE.md 등 자체 format-lint 가진 재주입 파일도 aggregate 총합에 합산(per-source cap 은 안 함) → budget 이 실제 per-turn 총 토큰 반영(현 25241B<26000). convergence pr-cycle-ts-1 해결됨 갱신. tsc·lint green. (A2 commons 트림은 거버넌스 신중 위해 별도 턴)

title: feat(lint): aggregate inject 예산(injectBudgetBytes) — context-rot 총합 가드
body: context-rot 4대 메커니즘 중 ① 의 본질(총 토큰)을 닫는 aggregate inject 예산 추가. per-source injectCaps 는 한 파일 폭주만 막아 여러 소스 합 비대(death-by-a-thousand-cuts)를 못 막음 → lint.injectBudgetBytes(22000) 총합천장 신설, injectCapViolations() 가 단일파일 소스 합 검사(dir키 styles/ 는 언어변종 1개만 주입되니 제외)해 INJECT-BUDGET 위반 push. lint(커밋)+ship 0단계 공유. lib/config.ts 타입 보강. 현 합 20471B<22000 통과·예산초과시 차단 스모크 OK. ②tool-overload=MCP Rule-of-Two 가드(부분·에이전트 레지스트리는 sidecar 밖)·④lost-in-mid=재주입이 맥락끝(favored)이라 이미 정렬.

title: refactor(ship): 범용 qa 철회 + ship 을 sidecar-repo 전용으로 게이트 + AI멍청 재발방지 inject-bloat 가드
body: ① 범용 qa 명령 철회(scope 과확장): modules/qa.ts·commands/qa.md 삭제, cli 등록·help·ARCHITECTURE 에서 qa 제거. ② ship 은 본래 범용이 아님(2-3단계 self-update/shadow 가 sidecar 설치 대상) → isSidecarRepo() pre-gate 로 sidecar 소스 repo(cli/index.ts+modules/shadow.ts+commands/) 밖에선 거부, 타 repo 는 pr-cycle 안내. ③ AI멍청(context-rot) 재발방지: lint 의 INJECT-OVERSIZED 를 injectCapViolations() 로 추출(중복제거) → lint(commit) + ship 0단계(pre-flight) 공유. injectCaps byte천장 초과 시 ship STOP, 우회 플래그 없음(no-escape-hatch). 스모크: gate 통과/거부 + 가드 통과/차단 양방향 OK, tsc·lint green.

title: feat(qa): 정식 all-PASS QA 명령 + ship pre-flight 게이트 배선
body: 정식 QA 경로 신설: 신규 명령 sidecar qa = all-PASS 바(ci 검증 + lint L0/injectCaps/CHANGELOG/convergence + audit 무-0축 · --min 으로 총점 바닥 상향). ship 의 pre-flight 게이트로 배선(ship 1/4=qa → red 면 전파 STOP · no-escape-hatch 우회불가). qa 는 CLI 단일경로라 CC/Pi 두 surface 가 같은 ship 호출로 자동 적용(훅 미변경). commands/qa.md 슬래시 노출 · ARCHITECTURE surface-checkpoint 갱신 · toolkit 78.

title: feat(architecture): result sync — config-driven idempotent backfill of the result store from a domain JSONL ledger
body: Add `sidecar architecture result sync` — backfills results.records[] from a config-declared JSONL ledger (config.resultSync: source·subjectKey·valueKey·metricKey·tierKey·truncate·skip[]·stateMap[{match,state}]). Domain-AGNOSTIC engine: the source + field keys + tier→state regex map are per-repo config, no domain vocabulary hardcoded (module-grading). Idempotent — an already-recorded subject is left untouched, only new measured outcomes appended, so it runs repeatedly / can be hooked to keep the store current without manual backfill. Motivated by a 10-min anima monitor showing ~50 verdicts land in HYPOTHESES.jsonl per window with the result store getting 0 auto (no sync) → drift. NOTE for config authors: order neg-conv BEFORE pos-conv in stateMap so 'NOT-SUPPORTED' isn't caught by a bare 'support' pattern (first-match). Smoke-verified: classify (pos/neg/in-prog), skip (non-outcome tiers), idempotent (+0 on re-run). deno check + config type clean.

title: fix(architecture): result sync — reconcile (add-new + update-re-measured) with review-then-update, not blind append
body: Root-cause fix: the shipped `result sync` (PR #313) was append-only — it skipped every already-recorded subject, so a re-MEASURED hypothesis (verdict/state changed) left a STALE store record (silent drift the sweep never caught). Rewrote sync as a RECONCILE: ADD genuinely-new measured subjects AND UPDATE the state of any subject whose source verdict changed. Review-then-update: default is a DRY-RUN that prints the plan (N add · M update with state old→new) and writes nothing; `--apply` commits. value is left intact on update (curation preserved) — only state (+metric evidence) refreshed. Smoke: dry-run writes nothing · apply adds new + flips re-measured state · re-apply = nothing-to-reconcile (idempotent).

title: feat(architecture): gate-stop-check — enforce DIRECT type:gate node update on verdict; drop result sync (auto)
body: Pivot per owner: no auto-store/sync. (1) Removed `result sync` verb + resultSync config (the rejected auto-classify path). (2) New Stop hook `architecture gate-stop-check` (config/gate-signals.json · per-repo .harness/gate-signals.json): when the agent's output carries a gate/verdict signal but no `🔬 GATE` marker, it BLOCKS — inducing the agent to DIRECTLY update the matching `type:"gate"` node's verdict in ARCHITECTURE.json (update-in-place, review-then-update — NOT a separate store) then report `🔬 GATE 갱신: <id>` / `🔬 GATE: 해당 없음`. Per-signal nudge (once/session) · stop_hook_active bound · CC-only (Pi has no blocking stop). Mirrors convergenceStopCheck. anima side (#2703): results store discarded, G-gate nodes tagged type:gate+verdict. Manual result CRUD kept dormant (generic store). Smoke: block on verdict-no-marker · pass with marker · sync gone · result add alive.

title: docs(convergence): index-ts-1 — cli/index.ts HELP backtick breaks the whole CLI (self-update cannot self-heal)
body: Record the #315→#316 incident: a raw backtick in the HELP template literal (gate-stop-check help clause) terminated the literal early -> esbuild parse failure -> ALL sidecar commands dead (global CLI). Worse, self-update runs THROUGH the broken CLI so it cannot self-heal (chicken-and-egg) -> the install clone had to be hard-synced to origin/main by git directly. Lesson keyed to cli/index.ts: HELP is a backtick template literal, use single quotes / escape backticks in any help/description clause; add a sidecar-help parse smoke before ship. Mirrors the modules/CLAUDE.md gotcha (which was violated).

title: fix(setup): wire gate-stop-check into install-hooks Stop[] (settings.json) — was only in hooks.json
body: gate-stop-check (#315) was added to hooks/hooks.json but NOT modules/setup.ts Stop[] (the hardcoded list install-hooks writes into ~/.claude/settings.json). On this host the ACTIVE Stop hooks are settings.json calling sidecar directly, not the plugin, so a hook only in hooks.json never fires (reload / plugin update were red herrings). Recurrence of the recorded convergence setup-ts-1 (dual-wiring: setup.ts Stop[] + hooks.json both, then install-hooks). Fix: added the entry; re-run install-hooks --global to merge into settings.json.

title: docs(architecture): trim gate-stop-check node under c4 cap (300)
body: The dual-wiring note pushed detail-gate-stop-check to 364 chars > 300 c4 cap. Trimmed to the crisp kernel (~250) keeping the block behavior + TWO-surface wiring pointer.
